title: meliosma arnottiana subsp. oldhamii
intro: Meliosma arnottiana subsp. oldhamii, also known as the Oldham's meliosma, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of the Philippines. It is a flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Meliosma arnottiana subsp. oldhamii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and prevent the growth of certain bacteria and viruses. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are made by steeping the leaves, stems, or roots in hot water.
